aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Sharp urgency

💼 Career: Tum fast move karoge par ek detail miss ho sakti hai

❤️ Love: Jaldi reaction se argument ho sakta hai

💰 Money: Impulsive decision avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Check twice, act once

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum speed me accuracy sacrifice kar dete ho
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Calm persistence

💼 Career: Tumhara steady kaam trust aur respect build karega

❤️ Love: Comfort aur stability feel hogi

💰 Money: Gradual gain strong hai

🧘 Advice: Jo chal raha hai usse continue rakho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum consistency se hi game jeette ho

♊ Gemini

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum options ke chakkar me clarity kho dete ho
